title: National Parks
description: Can you find these iconic US National Parks on the map?

rounds.clue: The oldest national park in the US, known for its geysers and hot springs sitting atop a supervolcano.
Famous for its giant sequoia trees, this California park's valley floor is surrounded by granite cliffs including El Capitan.
Straddling the border of Arizona and Utah, this park is known for its towering sandstone buttes and mesas.
rounds.answer: Monument Valley Navajo Tribal Park, AZ/UT

rounds.clue: The most visited national park in the US, located in the Appalachian Mountains between Tennessee and North Carolina.
rounds.answer: Great Smoky Mountains National Park, TN/NC

rounds.clue: This Florida park protects the largest subtropical wilderness in the US, home to manatees and alligators.
